columns.doc: Spectral class of the host star
columns.name: star-class

columns.doc: Whether the world is tidally locked to its star
columns.name: tidally-locked

columns.doc: Length of the solar day in standard hours; Absent if tidally locked
columns.name: day-length-hours

columns.doc: Length of the year in standard days
columns.name: year-std-days

columns.doc: Length of the year in local days; Absent if tidally locked
columns.name: year-local-days

columns.doc: Axial tilt in degrees
columns.name: obliquity-degrees

columns.doc: Peak-to-peak obliquity swing over one obliquity period (2× the deep-time forcing amplitude, SKY-21); a moonless world keeps the full drawn wobble, a moon damps it
columns.name: obliquity-range

columns.doc: Number of moons in orbit
columns.name: moons-admitted

columns.doc: Whether moon genesis recorded refusals
columns.name: refused-a-moon

columns.doc: Sum of all moon tidal forces
columns.name: total-tide

columns.doc: How many cycles of the nearest moon fit in one year; Absent if no moons
columns.name: months-per-year-innermost

columns.doc: Number of notable neighbor stars
columns.name: neighbor-count

columns.doc: Spectral class of the brightest neighbor, in kebab-case
columns.name: brightest-neighbor-class

columns.doc: The first belief's sentiment tag ('eternal', 'cyclic', or 'ambient'); Absent if no beliefs
columns.name: belief-kind

columns.doc: Number of genesis notes recorded
columns.name: genesis-note-count

columns.doc: Number of tectonic plates the globe drew or was pinned to
columns.name: plate-count

columns.doc: Fraction of globe cells below sea level
columns.name: ocean-fraction

columns.doc: Fraction of land cells standing above 2000 m over the sea
columns.name: mountain-coverage

columns.doc: Circulation bands per hemisphere; 'locked' if tidally locked
columns.name: band-count

columns.doc: Fraction of cells that are habitable (land, water, tolerable season)
columns.name: habitable-fraction

columns.doc: Fraction of cells with tectonic unrest above 0.3
columns.name: unrest-coverage

columns.doc: The most common land biome by cell count, kebab-case
columns.name: dominant-land-biome

columns.doc: Annual-mean temperature averaged over land cells, °C; Absent if the world has no land
columns.name: mean-land-temperature-c

columns.doc: Number of settlements placed in the world
columns.name: settlement-count

columns.doc: Mean population across every settlement's committed population fact; Absent if there are none
columns.name: mean-population

columns.doc: The goblin flagship settlement's committed subsistence mode (the pantheon's community, spec §6); Absent if there is no goblin flagship or no committed subsistence
columns.name: flagship-subsistence

columns.doc: The goblin flagship settlement's committed biome; Absent if there is no goblin flagship
columns.name: flagship-biome

columns.doc: Whether the goblin flagship settlement's cell borders an ocean cell, recomputed from the terrain provider; Absent if there is no goblin flagship
columns.name: flagship-coastal

columns.doc: Number of castes present in the goblin flagship settlement's emergent structure (a stratification proxy, matched against the same community religion's pantheon-verticality reasons about); Absent if there is no goblin flagship
columns.name: flagship-structure-size

columns.doc: Fraction of land cells that are endorheic (interior-draining)
columns.name: endorheic-coverage

columns.doc: Number of beliefs in the goblin flagship's pantheon; Absent if there are none
columns.name: pantheon-size

columns.doc: The goblin flagship's pantheon's shared cult form ('organized' or 'folk'); Absent if no goblin beliefs
columns.name: cult-form

columns.doc: Whether the goblin flagship's pantheon is ranked (a high god presides) or flat; Absent if there is no goblin flagship pantheon
columns.name: pantheon-verticality

columns.doc: The sentiment tag of the goblin flagship's head deity (the most salient belief): 'eternal', 'cyclic', or 'ambient'; Absent if no goblin beliefs
columns.name: head-deity-periodicity

columns.doc: The goblin flagship's committed role ladder, comma-joined, lowest to highest; Absent if goblins placed no settlement
columns.name: goblin-flagship-roles

columns.doc: The kobold flagship's committed role ladder, comma-joined, lowest to highest; Absent if kobolds placed no settlement
columns.name: kobold-flagship-roles

columns.doc: The goblin flagship settlement's committed population; Absent if goblins placed no settlement
columns.name: goblin-flagship-population

columns.doc: The kobold flagship settlement's committed population; Absent if kobolds placed no settlement
columns.name: kobold-flagship-population

columns.doc: The goblin flagship cell's subsistence surplus, recomputed from providers as fertility(biome_class) × moisture (the independent column the slave calibration needs); Absent if goblins placed no settlement
columns.name: goblin-flagship-surplus

columns.doc: The kobold flagship cell's subsistence surplus, recomputed from providers as fertility(biome_class) × moisture (the independent column the slave calibration needs); Absent if kobolds placed no settlement
columns.name: kobold-flagship-surplus

columns.doc: Whether the goblin flagship settlement's cell borders an ocean cell, recomputed from the terrain provider; Absent if goblins placed no settlement
columns.name: goblin-flagship-coastal

columns.doc: Whether the kobold flagship settlement's cell borders an ocean cell, recomputed from the terrain provider; Absent if kobolds placed no settlement
columns.name: kobold-flagship-coastal

columns.doc: Number of settlements peopled by goblins
columns.name: goblin-settlement-count

columns.doc: Number of settlements peopled by kobolds
columns.name: kobold-settlement-count

columns.doc: Venue domain of the goblin flagship's head deity: solar, lunar, or ambient; Absent without a goblin pantheon
columns.name: head-deity-domain-goblin

columns.doc: Venue domain of the kobold flagship's head deity: solar, lunar, or ambient; Absent without a kobold pantheon
columns.name: head-deity-domain-kobold

columns.doc: Number of deities in the goblin flagship's pantheon; Absent without one
columns.name: pantheon-size-goblin

columns.doc: Number of deities in the kobold flagship's pantheon; Absent without one
columns.name: pantheon-size-kobold

columns.doc: Cult form of the goblin flagship's pantheon (organized/folk); Absent without one
columns.name: cult-form-goblin

columns.doc: Cult form of the kobold flagship's pantheon (organized/folk); Absent without one
columns.name: cult-form-kobold

columns.doc: Whether the fixed structural rule (lunar head, then cyclic share, then size — no lexical input) attributes the kobold pantheon correctly; Absent unless both peoples hold pantheons
columns.name: blind-attribution-correct

columns.doc: Whether every generated name (settlement, deity, epithet) attributed to goblins in this world re-validates against the goblin phonology, independently re-derived and re-parsed from the surface string; Absent if goblins produced no names
columns.name: phonotactic-validity-goblin

columns.doc: Whether every generated name (settlement, deity, epithet) attributed to kobolds in this world re-validates against the kobold phonology, independently re-derived and re-parsed from the surface string; Absent if kobolds produced no names
columns.name: phonotactic-validity-kobold

columns.doc: Whether every committed goblin deity epithet carries a prepended honorific affix — DETECTED from the committed epithet content: the committed word, case-folded, must end with the independently re-derived honorific-OFF stem and be strictly longer (Rank status basis → honorifics on, spec §7); Absent if goblins hold no pantheon
columns.name: epithet-honorific-goblin

columns.doc: Whether every committed kobold deity epithet carries a prepended honorific affix — DETECTED from the committed epithet content (see epithet-honorific-goblin); kobold's Knowledge status basis leaves honorifics off, so the committed epithet equals the plain stem and this reads false; Absent if kobolds hold no pantheon
columns.name: epithet-honorific-kobold

columns.doc: Mean character length of every generated name (settlement, deity, epithet) attributed to goblins in this world; Absent if goblins produced no names
columns.name: name-length-goblin

columns.doc: Mean character length of every generated name (settlement, deity, epithet) attributed to kobolds in this world; Absent if kobolds produced no names
columns.name: name-length-kobold

columns.doc: Fraction of this world's settlement + deity names (across every species) that duplicate another name in the same world — uniqueness is de-facto, not enforced (Task 9), so this MEASURES the collision rate rather than asserting zero. Scope: settlement and deity proper nouns only; epithets are deliberately EXCLUDED (they are descriptive words expected to repeat by design, so they are not collision candidates). Absent if the world has no settlement or deity names
columns.name: name-collision-rate

columns.doc: Venue domain of the goblin-twin flagship's head deity (null control, spec §4); Absent without a goblin-twin pantheon
columns.name: head-deity-domain-goblin-twin

columns.doc: Number of deities in the goblin-twin flagship's pantheon (null control); Absent without one
columns.name: pantheon-size-goblin-twin

columns.doc: Cult form of the goblin-twin flagship's pantheon (null control); Absent without one
columns.name: cult-form-goblin-twin

columns.doc: Mean character length of every generated name attributed to the goblin-twin (null control); Absent if it produced no names
columns.name: name-length-goblin-twin

columns.doc: Fraction of the goblin flagship pantheon's source phenomena that are periodic (the pick_kobold input the null control needs); Absent without a goblin pantheon
columns.name: pantheon-cyclic-share-goblin

columns.doc: Fraction of the goblin-twin flagship pantheon's source phenomena that are periodic (null control); Absent without one
columns.name: pantheon-cyclic-share-goblin-twin

columns.doc: Whether every committed settlement name-gloss fact in this world is a truthful composition of that SAME settlement's own re-derived site concepts (biome + presiding phenomenon), independently re-derived here rather than read back from worldgen's own composition; Absent if no settlement in this world carries a gloss
columns.name: name-gloss-true

columns.doc: Whether every goblin lexicon Root entry's recorded sound-change derivation replays byte-identically through evolve (Neogrammarian regularity, spec §9.1); Absent if the goblin lexicon minted no Root
columns.name: lexicon-regular-goblin

columns.doc: Whether every kobold lexicon Root entry's recorded sound-change derivation replays byte-identically through evolve (Neogrammarian regularity, spec §9.1); Absent if the kobold lexicon minted no Root
columns.name: lexicon-regular-kobold

columns.doc: Whether the goblin lexicon is exposure-sound: no concept an INDEPENDENT re-derivation of exposure classifies Unknown ever backs a Root entry, and every committed Gap carries a non-empty reason (spec §9.2); Absent if the goblin lexicon has no entries
columns.name: exposure-sound-goblin

columns.doc: Whether the kobold lexicon is exposure-sound: no concept an INDEPENDENT re-derivation of exposure classifies Unknown ever backs a Root entry, and every committed Gap carries a non-empty reason (spec §9.2); Absent if the kobold lexicon has no entries
columns.name: exposure-sound-kobold

columns.doc: The goblin hue-ladder acquisition depth (2-5) derived from its perception vector's night-vision (spec §7's pack-depth model card); Absent if goblin is not in this world's roster
columns.name: hue-depth-goblin

columns.doc: The kobold hue-ladder acquisition depth (2-5) derived from its perception vector's night-vision (spec §7's pack-depth model card); Absent if kobold is not in this world's roster
columns.name: hue-depth-kobold

columns.doc: Shoreline development index: coastline length over the circumference of the circle with the land's area (1 = maximally compact); Absent without a shoreline
columns.name: shoreline-development

columns.doc: Ashman's D between land and ocean elevation populations (Earth is strongly bimodal); Absent when a world lacks land or ocean
columns.name: hypsometric-bimodality

columns.doc: Fraction of cells within the shelf band (±200 m) of sea level — the populated shelf Earth's hypsometry keeps
columns.name: shelf-fraction

columns.doc: Connected land components at least 0.5% of the world's total land cells (Task 9 iteration 3's size floor, Earth-calibrated: Greenland is ~1.4% of Earth's land and qualifies, Iceland ~0.07% does not) — the unfloored fringe of sub-floor fragments is preserved separately by landmass-count
columns.name: continent-count

columns.doc: Largest land component's share of all land cells; Absent on a landless world
columns.name: largest-continent-share

columns.doc: Gini coefficient over plate cell counts (Earth's plate sizes are heavy-tailed; uniform Voronoi scores low)
columns.name: plate-size-gini

columns.doc: Every connected land component regardless of size — the unfloored companion continent-count superseded away from; reported alongside forever
columns.name: landmass-count

columns.doc: Whether every daughter's lexicon (goblin, hobgoblin, bugbear, kobold) is Neogrammarian-regular: every Root's recorded derivation replays byte-identically through evolve, checked for EVERY daughter in this world's roster (spec §9.1, generalized family-wide); Absent if no daughter minted a Root
columns.name: lexicon-regular-family

columns.doc: Whether every goblinoid daughter's (goblin, hobgoblin, bugbear) Root derivation.proto matches an INDEPENDENT re-draw of the shared "goblinoid" family proto-root for that concept (spec §3: cognates share a proto ancestor) — never reading the family proto back from a sibling's own recorded derivation; Absent if no goblinoid daughter minted a Root
columns.name: monophyly-goblinoid

columns.doc: Whether kobold — the family with no siblings — never coincides with the goblinoid family: for every concept kobold holds as a Root, its recorded proto-root differs from an INDEPENDENT re-draw of the "goblinoid" family proto-root for that same concept (spec §3's clean outgroup); Absent if kobold minted no Root
columns.name: clean-outgroup-kobold

columns.doc: Whether every goblin lexicon Root's modern form draws only segments in goblin's own drawn inventory (spec §2.2's nativization contract); Absent if goblin minted no Root
columns.name: inventory-closure-goblin

columns.doc: Whether every hobgoblin lexicon Root's modern form draws only segments in hobgoblin's own drawn inventory (spec §2.2's nativization contract); Absent if hobgoblin minted no Root
columns.name: inventory-closure-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Whether every bugbear lexicon Root's modern form draws only segments in bugbear's own drawn inventory (spec §2.2's nativization contract); Absent if bugbear minted no Root
columns.name: inventory-closure-bugbear

columns.doc: Whether every kobold lexicon Root's modern form draws only segments in kobold's own drawn inventory (spec §2.2's nativization contract); Absent if kobold minted no Root
columns.name: inventory-closure-kobold

columns.doc: Count of DISTINCT proto segments (drawn from the shared goblinoid family proto-phonology) appearing in goblin's own Root proto-roots that nativize.rs collapses onto an existing goblin inventory segment (i.e. absent from goblin's own inventory) — the measured cost of goblin's nativization under the loudness-drawn inventory (spec §3); Absent if goblin minted no Root
columns.name: divergence-magnitude-goblin

columns.doc: Count of DISTINCT proto segments (drawn from the shared goblinoid family proto-phonology) appearing in hobgoblin's own Root proto-roots that nativize.rs collapses onto an existing hobgoblin inventory segment (i.e. absent from hobgoblin's own inventory) — the measured cost of hobgoblin's nativization under the loudness-drawn inventory (spec §3); Absent if hobgoblin minted no Root
columns.name: divergence-magnitude-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Count of DISTINCT proto segments (drawn from the shared goblinoid family proto-phonology) appearing in bugbear's own Root proto-roots that nativize.rs collapses onto an existing bugbear inventory segment (i.e. absent from bugbear's own inventory) — the measured cost of bugbear's nativization under the loudness-drawn inventory (spec §3); Absent if bugbear minted no Root
columns.name: divergence-magnitude-bugbear

columns.doc: Whether some concept rooted in ALL THREE goblinoid daughters (goblin, hobgoblin, bugbear) has ≥2 distinct present-day forms — the seed-swept stemmatics guard (spec §3): descent is proven by shared INNOVATIONS, not a shared ancestor alone, so a degenerate family whose daughters are silent aliases of one another must read false; Absent if no concept is rooted in all three
columns.name: divergence-real

columns.doc: Count of distinct-concept pairs whose goblin Root.modern forms coincide (two proto-roots merged onto one surface form) — an observation, not a pass/fail invariant: homophony is legal and realistic, and this banks the confound L4's reconstruction will fight (homophones read as one word); Absent if goblin minted no Root
columns.name: homophony-count-goblin

columns.doc: Count of distinct-concept pairs whose hobgoblin Root.modern forms coincide (two proto-roots merged onto one surface form) — an observation, not a pass/fail invariant; Absent if hobgoblin minted no Root
columns.name: homophony-count-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Count of distinct-concept pairs whose bugbear Root.modern forms coincide (two proto-roots merged onto one surface form) — an observation, not a pass/fail invariant; expected highest among the goblinoid daughters, bugbear drawing the smallest family inventory; Absent if bugbear minted no Root
columns.name: homophony-count-bugbear

columns.doc: Count of distinct-concept pairs whose kobold Root.modern forms coincide (two proto-roots landed on one surface form) — an observation, not a pass/fail invariant, banked for the clean-outgroup comparison; Absent if kobold minted no Root
columns.name: homophony-count-kobold

columns.doc: Count of goblin homophone pairs where BOTH concepts are core vocabulary (universal + body + kin packs) — the functional-load-restricted homophony the fix drives to zero; always ≤ homophony-count-goblin; Absent if goblin minted no Root
columns.name: core-homophony-goblin

columns.doc: Count of hobgoblin homophone pairs where BOTH concepts are core vocabulary (universal + body + kin packs); always ≤ homophony-count-hobgoblin; Absent if hobgoblin minted no Root
columns.name: core-homophony-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Count of bugbear homophone pairs where BOTH concepts are core vocabulary (universal + body + kin packs); always ≤ homophony-count-bugbear; Absent if bugbear minted no Root
columns.name: core-homophony-bugbear

columns.doc: Count of kobold homophone pairs where BOTH concepts are core vocabulary (universal + body + kin packs); always ≤ homophony-count-kobold; Absent if kobold minted no Root
columns.name: core-homophony-kobold

columns.doc: Fraction of goblin colliding surface forms that are MERGERS (colliding roots carry ≥2 distinct proto-forms — the cascade or nativization made the collision after the proto) rather than draw-collisions (one shared proto); Absent if goblin has no collision (an undefined ratio, never reported as 0)
columns.name: homophony-merger-share-goblin

columns.doc: Fraction of hobgoblin colliding surface forms that are MERGERS (≥2 distinct proto-forms) rather than draw-collisions; Absent if hobgoblin has no collision
columns.name: homophony-merger-share-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Fraction of bugbear colliding surface forms that are MERGERS (≥2 distinct proto-forms) rather than draw-collisions; Absent if bugbear has no collision
columns.name: homophony-merger-share-bugbear

columns.doc: Fraction of kobold colliding surface forms that are MERGERS (≥2 distinct proto-forms) rather than draw-collisions; Absent if kobold has no collision
columns.name: homophony-merger-share-kobold

columns.doc: Count of goblin core homophone pairs that are CONFUSABLE (both concepts share a semantic domain — universal/body/kin — so they compete in one context); the same-domain subset of core-homophony-goblin, always ≤ it; the complement is FREE cross-domain homophony; Absent if goblin minted no Root
columns.name: confusable-homophony-goblin

columns.doc: Count of hobgoblin core homophone pairs that are CONFUSABLE (both concepts share a semantic domain); the same-domain subset of core-homophony-hobgoblin, always ≤ it; Absent if hobgoblin minted no Root
columns.name: confusable-homophony-hobgoblin

columns.doc: Count of bugbear core homophone pairs that are CONFUSABLE (both concepts share a semantic domain); the same-domain subset of core-homophony-bugbear, always ≤ it; Absent if bugbear minted no Root
columns.name: confusable-homophony-bugbear

columns.doc: Count of kobold core homophone pairs that are CONFUSABLE (both concepts share a semantic domain); the same-domain subset of core-homophony-kobold, always ≤ it; Absent if kobold minted no Root
columns.name: confusable-homophony-kobold

columns.doc: Size of goblin's realized tone inventory (spec §11): 1 for an atonal people; >1 only for a tone-capable species; Absent if goblin is off-roster
columns.name: tone-count-goblin

columns.doc: Size of kobold's realized tone inventory (spec §11): 1 for an atonal people; Absent if kobold is off-roster
columns.name: tone-count-kobold

columns.doc: Goblin's distinguishable-syllable capacity (spec §2.3): onset × nucleus × coda fillings, a lower bound on distinct syllables (tone folded into the nucleus); Absent if goblin is off-roster
columns.name: distinguishable-capacity-goblin

columns.doc: Bugbear's distinguishable-syllable capacity (spec §2.3): onset × nucleus × coda fillings; bugbear draws the smallest family inventory; Absent if bugbear is off-roster
columns.name: distinguishable-capacity-bugbear

columns.doc: Kobold's distinguishable-syllable capacity (spec §2.3): onset × nucleus × coda fillings; Absent if kobold is off-roster
columns.name: distinguishable-capacity-kobold

study.description: The Census of the Meeting: the solo-roster null control over 500 seeds. Two goblin-vectored species (goblin, goblin-twin) each placed ALONE, landing in identical cells and diverging only through name-salted noise — the population whose distributional indistinguishability and at-chance blind attribution prove Year-2's measured divergence is attributable to the vectors, not stream noise (spec §4).
study.name: census-of-the-meeting
